title: Bomb Disposal Expert
description: A small mod that allows you to dispose of bombs.
body:
Bomb Disposal Expert is a fun mod that allows you to dispose of bombs (and Creepers!). After installing it, you will have a more graceful solution than using water buckets.

By clicking TNT with shears, you can defuse a TNT or a primed TNT. This will drop a TNT without gunpowder, which is not ignitable.

You can also click a Creeper with shears to make it neutralized. This will make it drop gunpowder and no longer follow you.

## How to use

Clicking a primed TNT with shears to defuse it.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZiYueCommentary/BombDisposalExpert/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1/images/primed_tnt.gif)

You can also defuse an unprimed TNT, which it will become a no gunpowder TNT.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZiYueCommentary/BombDisposalExpert/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1/images/tnt.gif)

Furthermore, defuse a Creeper! Creepers that defused will no longer attack you.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZiYueCommentary/BombDisposalExpert/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1/images/creeper.gif)

Also...

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZiYueCommentary/BombDisposalExpert/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1/images/what.gif)
